headline: QUANTA SERVICES REPORTS FIRST QUARTER 2026 RESULTS
summary: Quanta Services, Inc. (NYSE: PWR) today announced results for the three months ended March 31, 2026. Revenues in the first quarter of 2026 were $7.87 billion compared to revenues of $6.23 billion in the first quarter of 2025, and net income attributable to common stock was $220.6 million, or $1.45 per diluted share, in the first quarter of 2026 compared to net income attributable to common stock of $144.3 million, or $0.96 per diluted share, in the first quarter of 2025. Adjusted diluted earning

content.summary: Quanta Services, Inc. (NYSE: PWR) today announced results for the three months ended March 31, 2026. Revenues in the first quarter of 2026 were $7.87 billion compared to revenues of $6.23 billion in the first quarter of 2025, and net income attributable to common stock was $220.6 million, or $1.45 per diluted share, in the first quarter of 2026 compared to net income attributable to common stock of $144.3 million, or $0.96 per diluted share, in the first quarter of 2025.
